steps.title: Inquiry and calculation
steps.text: Submit a request and our specialists will prepare a detailed commercial offer with cost and timing calculations within 2 hours.

steps.text: We choose the optimal transport mode and route, taking into account your cargo specifics and safety requirements.

steps.title: Door-to-door delivery
steps.text: We handle cargo pickup, customs clearance and delivery to the final destination with full support.

map.title: Shipping Geography
map.description: We deliver to more than 60 countries around the globe. We use road, air, rail and multimodal solutions. We provide precise logistics, optimal routes and control at every stage of transport.

chat.defaultMessage: Hello! I am your international transport assistant. How can I help?

items.question: How is the transport cost calculated?
items.answer: The cost depends on the transport mode, cargo weight and volume, route, urgency and delivery terms (Incoterms). We prepare an individual estimate taking into account all costs: delivery, customs clearance, insurance — without hidden fees.

items.question: How long does cargo delivery take?
items.answer: Delivery times depend on the transport mode: air freight from 18 to 48 hours, road transport 5–12 days, rail 14–25 days, sea freight from 25 to 40 days. We specify the exact term in the commercial offer after route calculation.

items.question: What documents are required to process cargo?
items.answer: The basic package includes invoice, packing list, contract (for foreign trade) and transport documents (CMR, AWB, bill of lading depending on the transport mode). Some cargo categories may require compliance certificates. We help prepare a full document package.

items.question: Do you handle customs clearance?
items.answer: Yes, full customs clearance is included in our services: cargo declaration, calculation and payment of duties and taxes, interaction with customs authorities at every stage.

items.question: Can I track the cargo in transit?
items.answer: Yes, for each shipment we provide regular status reports and access to tracking at key stages: loading, transit, arrival, customs clearance and delivery to the recipient.

items.question: Do you insure cargo?
items.answer: Yes, we offer cargo insurance for all transport modes. Insurance cost is calculated individually based on declared value and cargo nature.

items.question: Is there a minimum cargo volume?
items.answer: There is no minimum volume — we work with full container and air shipments (FCL/FTL) as well as consolidated cargo (LCL/LTL) for smaller batches.

items.question: What payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: Payment is available by bank transfer for legal entities, and also by individual terms for regular clients, including partial prepayment and payment upon delivery.
